Manage opendbx plugins (Skills)

Usage:
  opendbx plugin [command]

Aliases:
  plugin, plugins

Available Commands:
  add         Add a plugin
  list        List installed plugins
  remove      Remove a plugin

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for plugin

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config

Use "opendbx plugin [command] --help" for more information about a command.
